Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.genmp

Class GenMPC

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.genmp.GenMPC
public class GenMPC extends Object
Core implementation of the generalized modus ponens reasoner.

  • Method Details

    • goal

      public Predicate goal()

    • neededHyps

      public Set<Predicate> neededHyps()

    • rewrittenGoal

      public Predicate rewrittenGoal()

    • isGoalDependent

      public boolean isGoalDependent()

    • hypActions

      public List<IHypAction> hypActions()

    • runGenMP

      public boolean runGenMP()
      Runs generalized Modus Ponens reasoner that generate the re-written goal and hypotheses and all the hypotheses needed to achieve it and all IHypActions computed. We first compute possible substitutes from hypotheses and goal. Then, we traverse each predicate to get the list of possible applications of substitutes and finally apply them.
